ModMetaData.name: Smart Genes
ModMetaData.author: Axolotl
ModMetaData.description:
Ever wanted your tortured artists to always be very neurotic and too smart? Now you can have that! Use genes to force traits and create a custom xenotype optimized to suffer. :D
This mod dynamically scans every trait in your game, vanilla or modded, and generates a dedicated gene to force it. Multi-degree traits like Neurotic/Very Neurotic and Careful Shooter/Trigger-Happy each get their own gene, so nothing gets skipped.
FEATURES - One gene per trait degree : full coverage, no gaps - Works automatically with modded traits (names may vary) - Forced-trait genes won't appear in random genepack or xenogerm drops — they're for building your ideal xenotype, not cluttering merchant inventories - Genes are sorted to the bottom of the gene picker to stay out of your way
NOTES - There are a lot of genes. Collapsing the SmartGenes category in the xenotype editor is strongly recommended - Smart Genes must load AFTER any mod whose traits you want covered - May log harmless warnings if another mod already defines a forced-trait gene with a conflicting name
Requires Biotech. Tested on 1.5 and 1.6.
GitHub: https://github.com/theAxolotlAntics/RimWorldMod-SmartGenes
